components.name: FeedHeader
components.description: Blog feed header with background image support, tag/service filters, search, and saved-only toggle. Combines a visual header area with interactive Controls for filtering blog posts.

props.name: handleLoadData
props.description: Callback to load data when filters change

props.name: queryParams
props.description: Current URL query parameters for filter state

components.name: MetaWrapper
components.description: Wrapper for page meta data. Optionally wraps the meta component with react-helmet's Helmet for server-side rendering support.

props.name: needHelmetWrapper
props.description: Whether the component needs a Helmet wrapper

components.name: Paginator
components.description: Pagination component for blog post lists. Renders page numbers with navigation arrows, analytics tracking, and automatic page count calculation.

props.name: totalItems
props.description: Total number of items across all pages

props.name: itemsPerPage
props.description: Number of items displayed per page

props.name: maxPages
props.description: Maximum number of pages to display

props.name: pageCountForShowSupportButtons
props.description: Minimum page count to show prev/next navigation buttons

props.name: queryParams
props.description: URL query parameters for building page links

components.name: PostCard
components.description: Blog post card component that displays a post preview with image, title, description, tags, date, reading time, and like functionality.

props.name: fullWidth
props.description: Whether the card should take full width

props.name: showTag
props.description: Whether to show the first tag label

props.name: titleHeadingLevel
props.description: HTML heading level for the title ('h2' | 'h3')

props.name: analyticsEvents
props.description: Analytics events configuration for the card

components.name: PostInfo
components.description: Blog post info panel displaying date, reading time, sharing controls, save/like button, and optional extra info items.

props.name: analyticsEventsContainer
props.description: Map of analytics events for sharing and save actions

components.name: SuggestPostInfo
components.description: Compact post info component for suggestion cards, showing date, reading time, and an optional save/like button.

props.name: hasUserLike
props.description: Whether the current user has liked the post

props.name: likes
props.type: { likesCount?: number; hasUserLike?: boolean; toggleLike?: ToggleLikeCallbackType }

props.name: dateId
props.description: ID for the date element, useful for accessible descriptions

props.name: readingTimeId
props.description: ID for the reading time element, useful for accessible descriptions

components.name: Posts
components.description: Blog posts list container that renders a grid of PostCard components with pinned post support, show-more button, pagination, and loading/error states.

props.name: containerId
props.description: HTML id for the cards container element

props.name: isShowMoreVisible
props.description: Whether the 'show more' button is visible

props.name: errorShowMore
props.description: Whether an error occurred during 'show more' loading

props.name: postCountOnPage
props.description: Total number of posts for pagination

props.name: perPageInQuery
props.description: Number of posts per page used in the query

props.name: isFetching
props.description: Whether posts are currently being fetched

props.name: postsOnPage
props.description: Array of post data for the current page

props.name: pinnedPostOnPage
props.description: Pinned post displayed prominently on the first page

props.name: pageCountForShowSupportButtons
props.description: Minimum page count to show prev/next navigation buttons in paginator

props.name: queryParams
props.description: URL query parameters for paginator links

components.name: PostsEmpty
components.description: Empty state component displayed when no blog posts match the current filters.

components.name: PostsError
components.description: Error state component displayed when blog posts fail to load. Shows an error message with a retry button.

props.name: onButtonClick
props.description: Callback for the retry button. Defaults to window.location.reload()

components.name: Prompt
components.description: Popup that appears with a text message and action buttons. Automatically disappears after a configurable duration and resets visibility on openTimestamp change.

props.name: actions
props.description: Array of button configurations for action buttons

props.name: openTimestamp
props.description: Unix timestamp in milliseconds when the Prompt opens. Changing resets the visible duration

props.name: openDuration
props.description: Milliseconds to remain visible before auto-closing

components.name: PromptSignIn
components.description: Authentication popup that appears when a user action requires login. Extends the Prompt component with a default sign-in action button.

props.name: onClickSignIn
props.description: Callback when the sign-in button is clicked. Defaults to an alert.

props.name: text
props.description: Prompt message text. Defaults to a localized sign-in prompt

props.name: actions
props.description: Action buttons. Defaults to a single sign-in button

props.name: openTimestamp
props.description: Unix timestamp in milliseconds when the Prompt opens

components.name: Search
components.description: Search input component for the blog main page. Based on TextInput from uikit with debounced submit, clear button, and auto-focus support.

props.name: onSubmit
props.description: Callback invoked with the search value after debounce

props.name: placeholder
props.description: Input placeholder text. Defaults to localized 'Search'

props.name: autoFocus
props.description: Whether to auto-focus the input on mount (disabled on iPhone)

components.name: Wrapper
components.description: Section wrapper component with configurable padding on all sides. Used to provide consistent spacing around blog content blocks.

props.name: paddings
props.description: Padding configuration with top, bottom, left, right sizes ('xs' | 's' | 'sm' | 'm' | 'l' | 'xl')

props.name: children
props.description: Content to render inside the wrapper

hooks.name: useAriaAttributes
hooks.description: Returns aria-labelledby and aria-describedby attributes by joining provided label and description IDs, filtering out falsy values.

parameters.name: labelIds
parameters.description: Array of label element IDs. Falsy values are filtered out

parameters.name: descriptionIds
parameters.description: Array of description element IDs. Falsy values are filtered out

hooks.name: useExtendedComponentMap
hooks.description: Merges the default blog-constructor block/header component map with custom components from a CustomConfig. Returns a memoized combined configuration.
hooks.signature: useExtendedComponentMap(custom: CustomConfig | undefined) => { blocks: Record<string, unknown>; headers: Record<string, unknown> }

parameters.name: custom
parameters.description: Custom component configuration to merge with defaults

hooks.return_type: { blocks: Record<string, unknown>; headers: Record<string, unknown> }

hooks.name: useHover
hooks.description: Tracks mouse hover state on an element. Returns a ref to attach to the target element and a boolean indicating whether it is being hovered.
hooks.signature: useHover<T extends HTMLElement = HTMLElement>() => [ref: React.RefObject<T>, hovering: boolean]

hooks.name: useIsIPhone
hooks.description: Returns whether the current device is an iPhone based on the DeviceContext.

hooks.name: useLikes
hooks.description: Manages like state for a blog post. Tracks whether the user has liked the post, the current like count, and provides a toggle handler with callback support.

parameters.name: hasLike
parameters.description: Initial like state from the user

parameters.name: toggleLikeCallback
parameters.description: Callback invoked when the like state is toggled

hooks.return_type: { likesCount: number; hasUserLike: boolean; handleLike: () => void }

hooks.name: useOpenCloseTimer
hooks.description: Timer hook that automatically updates an 'open' boolean state after a given duration. Used by the Prompt component for auto-dismiss behavior.
hooks.signature: useOpenCloseTimer(openTimestamp?: number, openDuration?: number) => { open: boolean }

parameters.name: openTimestamp
parameters.description: UNIX timestamp in milliseconds when the timer starts

parameters.name: openDuration
parameters.description: Duration in milliseconds before the state closes

hooks.name: usePromptSignInProps
hooks.description: Returns props for the PromptSignIn component including an openTimestamp state and a requireSignIn function that triggers the sign-in prompt.
hooks.signature: usePromptSignInProps(onClickSignIn?: React.EventHandler<React.SyntheticEvent>) => { onClickSignIn: React.EventHandler<React.SyntheticEvent> | undefined; openTimestamp: number; requireSignIn: (() => void) | undefined }

parameters.name: onClickSignIn
parameters.description: Sign-in click handler. If provided, requireSignIn will be available

hooks.return_type: { onClickSignIn: React.EventHandler<React.SyntheticEvent> | undefined; openTimestamp: number; requireSignIn: (() => void) | undefined }
